'''Aervis Wint''' was a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] of middle years who worked for [[Gungan Security]] in [[Gadrin]].

==Biography==
Aervis did not get out much, so was generally not up to date on current events. He sometimes nervously chewed on the tip of one of his ears. In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], fellow employee [[Broof Yurdel]] and twelve other of the company's employees disappeared to join the [[Cularin resistance]]. The additional workload caused Aervis to lose a lot of sleep.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: The Resistance Within}} {{1st}}
